faq_auto_16: folder into your project root. That's it — no npm install, no build step, no dependencies. Your AI agent automatically detects and uses the skills. See the
faq_auto_17: Quick answers to common questions. Can't find yours? Open a GitHub issue.
faq_auto_26: CodyMaster is a collection of 60+ AI skills that turn your coding AI (Gemini, Claude, Cursor, etc.) into a disciplined software engineering team. Instead of AI guessing randomly, skills enforce proven workflows: plan before code, test before deploy, verify before claim.

features.label: WHY THIS KIT
features.title:
Not scattered skills.
One integrated system.
features.subtitle: Instead of installing 20 random AI skills that don't talk to each other — CodyMaster is one complete system where every skill connects, every workflow links.

cards.title: 🧠 Learning Brain
cards.description: CodyMaster has a brain that learns. It remembers mistakes, draws lessons, and when it doesn't know something — it goes finding the right skill to upgrade itself. The more you use it, the smarter it gets.

cards.title: 🛡️ Multi-Layer Safety
cards.description: Strict multi-layer controls on every deploy. Your codebase won't get destroyed. No more 'deploy and pray'. Every change passes through quality gates before reaching production.

cards.title: 👥 Your Senior Team
cards.description: Using this kit = leveraging 10 years of product experience + a complete senior team from design to code to testing to deployment. One person. Full team power.

cards.title: 📄 Docs from Silence
cards.description: No documentation? No idea what the previous code does? cm-dockit generates complete technical docs AND user guides — from your existing code. Even the messiest legacy projects.

cards.title: 🔄 Legacy Rescue
cards.description: Even if your product is ancient, ux-master can scan your website, extract the design system, and rebuild tokens — giving old products new life without starting from scratch.

cards.title: 🛡️ Hardened Security
cards.description: Deep-level defense-in-depth security. Every push is scanned for secrets, every deploy passes through 4 safety gates. Your code stays yours, and your secrets stay secret.

hero.badge: Built by a PM with 10+ years · 60 Skills · Free
hero.headlineStatic: Your AI Senior Team — From A to Z
typingPhrases: For Lazy People Who Ship Fast 🦥

Install once. It learns. It improves. It ships.

howItWorks.deepSubtitle: Every task assigned to CodyMaster goes through an autonomous loop ensuring production-ready code.

install.title: Ready in 30 seconds
install.subtitle: One command installs all 60 skills. No npm, no config — just a Claude Code plugin.

install.globalDesc: Automatically connects CodyMaster to all detected IDEs and CLI agents on your machine.
install.universalSubtitle: One command to rule them all. Auto-detects and installs across all your AI agents and IDEs.
readme.feat1Desc: No gaps. No manual handoffs. Idea → Plan → Design → Test → Code → Debug → Deploy → Document. Every single phase is covered systematically.
readme.feat2Desc: Your AI remembers what went wrong and never repeats the same mistake via cm-continuity. It auto-discovers skills and searches massive codebases in seconds.
readme.feat3Desc: Every line of code passes through 4 safety gates: Test-Driven Development, Security Leak Scans, Git Isolation, and a Quality Gate before deployment.
readme.feat4Desc: Got a legacy product? cm-ux-master scans your site, extracts tokens, and builds a strict design system. Your AI builds beautiful interfaces that match your brand.
readme.featuresSubtitle: Other skill packs give you loose tools. CodyMaster gives you an interconnected operating system for your AI.
readme.heroSubtitle: Turn your chaotic AI into a disciplined, 60-skill senior engineering team. No random UI. No broken deploys. Just working products.
readme.how1Desc: Describe what you want in plain language. "Build me a booking SaaS" or "Fix the login bug". That's it.
readme.how2Desc: CodyMaster analyzes your request, runs strategic discovery (like TRIZ & 9 Windows), evaluates options, and creates a detailed implementation plan — like a senior PM would.
readme.how3Desc: Applies 48 UX Laws and your brand's design system to create production-ready UI — no Figma needed.
readme.how4Desc: Writes code test-first (TDD), scans for security leaks, and debugs issues automatically. No broken code ships.
readme.how5Desc: 8-gate deploy pipeline checks everything before going live. Auto-generates docs, i18n, and rollback strategy.
readme.howSubtitle: You chat. CodyMaster orchestrates 60 skills behind the scenes. Here's the flow.
readme.lazy1: Type a chat message and get a working product back.
readme.lazy2: Have your AI learn from its mistakes and get better every day.
readme.lazy3: Never setup the same boilerplate twice.
readme.prob1a: AI designs differently every single time — same brand, 3 different styles.
readme.prob2a: AI fixes one bug, silently breaks 5 other things.
readme.prob2b: You redo the same work 3-4 times.
readme.prob3a: AI writes zero tests, zero docs. Deploys to production = deploy and pray 🙏
readme.prob3b: Your codebase becomes a house of cards. Broken deploys at 2 AM.
readme.problemSubtitle: You installed an AI coding agent. It writes code faster than any human. But then reality hits.
readme.solutionSubtitle: CodyMaster acts as your senior counterpart, enforcing standards and shipping velocity across every discipline.
readme.solutionTitle: An Entire Senior Team in One Kit
readme.vs3Bad: Static — what you install is what you get
typewriter.m3: From idea to deploy. One chat.
typewriter.m7: Discipline built in. Not bolted on.

usp.label: WHAT MAKES US DIFFERENT
usp.title:
Not just another AI tool.
This is a design-first engine.
usp.subtitle: CodyMaster doesn't just write code — it designs, previews, and respects your existing design system.

cards.title: Kanban Dashboard
cards.description: Manage your entire project visually. Track tasks, skill pipelines, and deployments in real-time — all from one command center.

cards.title: Preview Design Before Code
cards.description: See exactly what your UI will look like before a single line of code is written. Iterate on design with AI — no surprises.

cards.title: Full Design Control
cards.description: Choose your aesthetic — typography, colors, spacing, animations. AI follows YOUR design direction, not random defaults.

cards.title: Works with Your Design System
cards.description: Already have a design system? CodyMaster reads your existing tokens, components, and brand guidelines — then builds with them.

why_cody_master_auto_16: The question isn't whether AI can code — it's whether the code it writes actually works in production.
why_cody_master_auto_17: Without guardrails, AI is a brilliant junior developer who never tests, never remembers context, deploys secrets to GitHub, and breaks what it built yesterday.
why_cody_master_auto_18: Everyone's using AI to code now.
whyHeroSub: AI can write code. But without discipline, it writes chaos. Here's why a skill kit changes everything.
whyIntroPrefix: Everyone's using AI to code now.
whyIntroStrong: The question isn't whether AI can code — it's whether the code it writes actually works in production.
whyIntroSuffix: Without guardrails, AI is a brilliant junior developer who never tests, never remembers context, deploys secrets to GitHub, and breaks what it built yesterday.
faqHeroSub: Everything you need to know about CodyMaster Kit, from installation to advanced workflows.

whySecurity.heroSub: In the age of AI, moving fast shouldn't mean leaving your secrets exposed. CodyMaster is built with a 'Security-First' mindset to protect your code and credentials.
whySecurity.introPrefix: AI can code faster than humans, but it doesn't always understand the consequences of a direct commit.
whySecurity.introStrong: CodyMaster acts as your digital shield.
whySecurity.introSuffix: Instead of 'YOLO' deploys, we enforce a strict 5-layer security protocol that scans, validates, and locks down your project before any damage is done.

left.title: Standard AI
items: Direct pushes to main branch by AI
No audit log of AI-generated changes

circuit.label: THE 5-LAYER SECURITY CIRCUIT
circuit.title: Autonomous Defense in Action
circuit.subtitle: Your code earned its way to production through 5 rigorous safety gates.

gates.title: The Sentinel
gates.desc: Scans for API keys and tokens. Blocks leaks before they touch git.
terminal: [BLOCK] Commit rejected. Secrets must be in .env

gates.title: The Sandbox
gates.desc: Executes tasks in isolated git worktrees. Prevents cross-contamination of code and environments.

gates.title: The Enforcer
gates.desc: Enforces Test-Driven Development (TDD). No feature is built without a verifiable test gate.

gates.title: The Inspector
gates.desc: Deep SAST scanning for vulnerabilities (XSS, SQLi) and logical audit trails.
terminal: Searching for XSS vulnerabilities... None found.

gates.title: The Vault
gates.desc: Final 8-gate deployment pipeline verification before reaching production.

hero.title:
It doesn't replace your AI.
It upgrades it.
hero.subtitle: CodyMaster is a super assistant that integrates straight into your AI tool. It grants your AI a 5-tier memory, 8-layer immune system, and 60 expert skills. Turning a novice into a self-learning, self-healing expert.
hero.micro: Free · Open Source · Cursor, Claude Code, Gemini, Windsurf, Kiro, Copilot & more

diagnose.label: �� Diagnose
diagnose.title:
Your AI Agent is sick.
Hover to see the cure.
diagnose.sub: Every AI coding agent suffers from the same 6 terminal diseases. Flip the cards to see how the symbiont cures each.

cards.name: Amnesia
cards.desc: Every session is a blank slate. Forgets context, repeating old mistakes.
cards.cureDesc: CONTINUITY.md + NotebookLM + CodeGraph — remembers everything, across sessions.

cards.name: Identity Disorder
cards.desc: 1 brand, 3 different styles. No design system, no consistency.
cards.cureDesc: Scan brand → extract tokens → apply 48 UX Laws → consistent universally.

cards.name: Autoimmune Collapse
cards.desc: Fix 1 bug, break 5 other places. No tests, no gates.
cards.cureDesc: TDD → Quality Gate → Secret Shield → Safe Deploy. Nothing slips through.

cards.name: Immune Deficiency
cards.desc: Hardcoded API keys, pushed secrets to GitHub. $10,000 AWS bill the next morning.
cards.cureDesc: Pre-commit scan, Gitleaks, token lifecycle. Scans before push.

cards.name: Metabolic Failure
cards.desc: Burning 140,000+ tokens per turn. Slow, expensive, wasteful.
cards.cureDesc: 3-layer loading: index → summary → full. Saves 95.5% tokens.

cards.name: Genetic Instability
cards.desc: Same prompt, different day, totally different output. Deploying is praying.
cards.cureDesc: SKILL.md standardizes output. TRIZ, Design Thinking, JTBD — no randomness.

diagnose.hint: 💡 Hover or tap the card to see how CodyMaster cures it

anatomy.label: 🧬 Anatomy
anatomy.title:
5 Organs. One Organism.
Explore Symbiont Anatomy.
anatomy.sub: Click each organ to understand how CodyMaster operates inside your AI agent.

organs.title: THE BRAIN — Read & Understand Source Code
organs.desc: Upon bonding, the symbiont reads the entire source code — AST, dependency graph, architecture patterns. It understands the host deeper than you understand your own project. 95% token compression via Structural Memory. It doesn't guess — it knows.

organs.title: IMMUNE SYSTEM — Multi-layer Protection
organs.desc: Like the human immune system: multiple overlapping layers of defense. 8 gates check before deploy. Blind Review — reviewer doesn't know context. Anti-Sycophancy — Devil's Advocate hunts hidden bugs. Secret Shield scans pre-commit.

organs.title: SELF-EVOLUTION — Learn, Adapt, Don't Repeat
organs.desc: Every bug fix becomes an antibody. Mistakes are logged in learnings.json with the Ebbinghaus decay curve — important knowledge is reinforced, unneeded things self-forget. Reinforced ≥2 times → promoted to long-term.

organs.title: DRAW BEFORE YOUR EYES — Approve then Code
organs.desc: Applies 48 UX Laws, scans current brand, extracts design tokens, creates design system. Shows you a preview — you approve — it codes pixel-perfectly. No Figma needed. You direct, it executes.

organs.title: EXTRAORDINARY LEARNING — Doesn't know? It learns.
organs.desc: Encountered an unknown skill? Auto-detects gaps via Skill Gap Detector, auto-researches from Design Thinking, TRIZ 9 Windows, JTBD. 60 skills distilled from dozens of world-leading methodologies.
